name: (Headspace) Kel | Milky Way
description:
"OH, YEAH!! FRESH AIR AT LAST!!

Gotta love that nature. Well, let's go!"

KEL is one of the main three deuteragonists that join OMORI's party in OMORI. When tagged as the leader, KEL can throw various ball projectiles from certain platforms to hit objects otherwise inaccessible to the party.

The HEADSPACE version of KEL appears as a young boy wearing a colorful tank top covered in multicolored squares. Like the others in the party, he does not wear socks or shoes and his hair and eyes are purple like AUBREY and HERO.

Source: https://omori.fandom.com/wiki/KEL
creator: null0_void
